nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: sr-(Methionyl Tripeptide-46 Hexapeptide-40 Decapeptide-27 Escherichia Phage T7 sh-Polypeptide-1 Octapeptide-46 Dipeptide-19 Hexapeptide-40)
chemicalDescription: sr-(Methionyl Tripeptide-46 Hexapeptide-40 Decapeptide-27 Escherichia Phage T7 sh-Polypeptide-1 Octapeptide-46 Dipeptide-19 Hexapeptide-40) is a single chain recombinant peptide, produced by fermentation in E. coli. The starting gene is synthesized by the fusion of the genes from Tripeptide-46, Hexapeptide-40, Decapeptide-27, s-Escherichia Phage T7 Polypeptide-1, Polypeptide-1, Octapeptide-46, Dipeptide-19, and Hexapeptide-40 with the initiation codon for methionine. The fusion peptide contains 205 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation, and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
inciName: SR-(METHIONYL TRIPEPTIDE-46 HEXAPEPTIDE-40 DECAPEPTIDE-27 ESCHERICHIA PHAGE T7 SH-POLYPEPTIDE-1 OCTAPEPTIDE-46 DIPEPTIDE-19 HEXAPEPTIDE-40)
